heading: Payments
label: 2005c Payments
text: The Surgeon General shall make payments under in advance or by way of reimbursement and in such installments consistent with construction progress, as he may determine.section 2005 of this title
notes: Transfer of FunctionsOffice of Surgeon General abolished by section 3 of Reorg. Plan No. 3 of 1966, eff. , 31 F.R. 8855, , and functions thereof transferred to Secretary of Health, Education, and Welfare by section 1 of Reorg. Plan No. 3 of 1966, set out as a note under . Secretary of Health, Education, and Welfare redesignated Secretary of Health and Human Services by , which is classified to , Education. Office of Surgeon General reestablished within the Office of the Assistant Secretary for Health, see Notice of Department of Health and Human Services, Office of the Assistant Secretary for Health, , 52 F.R. 11754.June 25, 1966Mar. 30, 198780 Stat. 1610section 202 of this titlesection 509(b) of Pub.
